name: Chili Cheese Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the eggs well.
2. Stir in flour, baking powder, cottage cheese, shredded Monterey Jack, and melted butter.
3. Add the chopped green chilies.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
6. Serve immediately. Makes 6-8 servings.
Origin: Mariane White, in Reminisce March/April 1993
Shared by: Sharon Stevens
